title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: This is exactly why I think an early election is more likely (if Burnham gets a good early bounce) than others on here.

The fiscal choices for the next two years are horrible.
